reviews.author: Guest Traveler 1
reviews.title: Will cruise again
reviews.body: Outstanding itineraries and beautiful scenery. Dining was a culinary highlight every single night. Slipped off to 21-Night Baltic Sea Capitals Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 2
reviews.title: Very relaxing experience
reviews.body: Refined atmosphere, excellent service, and beautiful ship design. Excursion slots filled up quickly, so book early. Slipped off to 21-Night Baltic Sea Capitals Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 3

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 4
reviews.title: Will cruise again
reviews.body: Outstanding itineraries and beautiful scenery. Dining was a culinary highlight every single night. Slipped off to 21-Night Baltic Sea Capitals Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 5
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 21-Night Baltic Sea Capitals Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 6
reviews.title: Fantastic value
reviews.body: The ship was clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi was a bit slow in remote areas, but overall a great value cruise. Slipped off to 21-Night Baltic Sea Capitals Explorer and had a fantastic time.
